info.name: Queri.ai API Collection
info.description: Official API contract and documentation for the Queri.ai backend.

request.description: Checks if the Queri.ai API is running and returns the current environment mode.
Retrieves the cached database schema (tables and columns) currently loaded by the application for RAG operations.

header.description: Optional: Defines the user's role for RBAC schema masking. Defaults to 'Customer' (least privilege).

request.description: Translates a natural language question into a PostgreSQL query. It uses Gemini LLM, prunes the schema context via FastEmbed vector embeddings, checks against SQLGlot AST safety rules, and performs a database dry-run. History is managed automatically if session_id is provided.

response.name: Query Generated Successfully
Self-Correction Failed

header.description: Optional: Defines the user's role for RBAC schema masking. Defaults to 'Customer' (least privilege).

request.description: Executes a validated SQL query against the database. It enforces read-only transactions, a strict configurable statement timeout (default 5000ms), and an AST-level row limit override (default 100) to prevent OOM errors.

response.name: Validation or DB Error

request.description: Takes the raw database results and the original question, and uses the LLM to generate a plain-English, conversational explanation of the findings.

response.name: Explanation Generated
